queries.question: What financial roles are present at every bank at the same time?
queries.sql: SELECT Financial_Roles.RoleName  from Banks_Financial_Roles join Financial_Roles on Banks_Financial_Roles.RoleID = Financial_Roles.RoleID join Banks on Banks_Financial_Roles.BankID = Banks.BankID   GROUP BY Banks_Financial_Roles.RoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Banks_Financial_Roles.BankID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Banks)

queries.question: For every bank list all of the financial roles available.
queries.sql: select banks.name , financial_roles.rolename from Banks_Financial_Roles join Financial_Roles on Banks_Financial_Roles.RoleID = Financial_Roles.RoleID join Banks on Banks_Financial_Roles.BankID = Banks.BankID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?rolename WHERE {
  ?banks_financial_roles a :Banks_Financial_Roles .
  ?financial_roles a :Financial_Roles .
  ?banks_financial_roles p:hasFinancial_Roles ?financial_roles .
  ?banks a :Banks .
  ?banks_financial_roles p:hasBanks ?banks .
  ?banks p:name ?name .
  ?financial_roles p:RoleName ?rolename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What financial roles are there for every bank?
